# security

```go
import "github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/internal/security"
```

Package security provides policy evaluation, whitelist management, and encryption helpers for USB device access control.

<a name="Engine"></a>
## type [Engine](<https://github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/blob/main/internal/security/policy.go#L18>)

Engine evaluates policy decisions for discovered devices. It checks vendor/product ID selectors, node restrictions, device class filtering, and HID denial rules. All comparisons are case\-insensitive.

@component PolicyEngine\["Policy Engine"\] \-\-\> PolicyCR\["USBDevicePolicy CR"\] @flow CheckSelector\["Match vendor/product/node"\] \-\-\> CheckRestrictions\["Check restrictions"\] @flow CheckRestrictions \-\-\> CheckHID\{"HID blocked?"\} @flow CheckHID \-\-\>|yes| Deny\["Deny"\] @flow CheckHID \-\-\>|no| Allow\["Allow"\]

```go
type Engine struct{}
```

<a name="Engine.Allows"></a>
### func \(\*Engine\) [Allows](<https://github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/blob/main/internal/security/policy.go#L26>)

```go
func (e *Engine) Allows(device usbv1alpha1.USBDevice, policy usbv1alpha1.USBDevicePolicy) bool
```

Allows checks whether a device is permitted by the given policy.

Intent: Evaluate policy selectors and restrictions against discovered device attributes. Inputs: Device and policy to evaluate. Outputs: True if the device passes all policy checks, false otherwise. Errors: None.

<a name="Engine.MatchesSelector"></a>
### func \(\*Engine\) [MatchesSelector](<https://github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/blob/main/internal/security/policy.go#L70>)

```go
func (e *Engine) MatchesSelector(device usbv1alpha1.USBDevice, policy usbv1alpha1.USBDevicePolicy) bool
```

MatchesSelector returns true if the device matches the policy's selector fields only.

Intent: Allow callers to determine if a policy applies to a device before evaluating restrictions. Inputs: Device and policy. Outputs: True if all non\-empty selector fields match.
